sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Eastern Bankshares Inc (EBC) Stock Price Quote Today & Current Price Chart
feed.summary: This article provides a stock price quote today for Eastern Bankshares Inc (EBC) along with a current price chart. It promotes online trading through the "Smart Investment App" by Capital.com.

feed.title: New Tenet Healthcare (NYSE: THC) controller to receive $475k salary
feed.summary: Tenet Healthcare announced changes in its accounting leadership, with R. Scott Ramsey retiring as Senior Vice President & Controller and Principal Accounting Officer effective April 30, 2026, and remaining on part-time for transition support. J. Michael Grooms has been appointed as the new Senior Vice President & Controller, effective April 6, 2026, and will become Principal Accounting Officer on May 1, 2026. Grooms' compensation package includes a $475,000 annual base salary, a target cash bonus, and significant equity grants.

feed.title: Datavault AI and Coppercore Inc. Announce Tokenization of High-Grade Copper Resources into Coppercoin(TM)
feed.summary: Datavault AI and Coppercore Inc. have announced a definitive agreement to tokenize high-grade copper resources into Coppercoin™ digital tokens. This initiative aims to address the projected surge in global copper demand, driven by AI, electrification, and renewable energy, by offering a transparent, fractional, and liquid digital ownership alternative to traditional, complex copper markets. The initial $100 million issuance of Coppercoin™ will leverage Datavault AI's patented blockchain platform, with each token representing five pounds of copper resources, and is set for launch by the end of Q2 this year.

feed.title: Ares Commercial (NYSE: ACRE) extends Morgan Stanley credit facility to 2029 and lifts capacity
feed.summary: Ares Commercial Real Estate Corporation has amended its credit facility with Morgan Stanley, extending the maturity date to July 16, 2029, and increasing the commitment from $250 million to $350 million. An accordion provision allows for a further increase of $50 million, boosting the total potential capacity to $400 million. This move is expected to support the company's stability by providing longer-term and larger secured funding for loan origination and holdings.

feed.title: Purple Biotech (PPBT) CFO details multi-million share options and RSUs
feed.summary: Purple Biotech's CFO, Shai S. Lankry, has updated his equity holdings, revealing significant stock options and restricted stock units (RSUs). The filing shows options to purchase a total of 6,550,000 ordinary shares under the company's 2016 Equity-Based Incentive Plan, with varying exercise prices and expiration dates in 2030. Additionally, Lankry holds 3,254,167 unvested RSUs, which will be settled in ordinary shares based on time-based vesting conditions.

feed.title: Citigroup, PwC Snagged in Clarivate Investor Suit Over Metrics
feed.summary: A federal court has allowed a proposed class action lawsuit against Clarivate Plc, its underwriter Citigroup Global Markets Inc., and auditor PricewaterhouseCoopers LLP to proceed. Investors allege a material misstatement in 2021 public offerings, citing significant changes in key metrics when Clarivate later restated financial figures. The ruling, issued by Judge Eric Komitee in the US District Court for the Eastern District of New York, green-lit the Securities Act claim.

feed.title: Brown & Brown sets April 28 investor webcast on Q1 results and AI use
feed.summary: Brown & Brown, Inc. (NYSE: BRO) will release its first-quarter 2026 earnings on April 27, 2026, after market close. Following this, the company will host an investor update conference call on April 28, 2026, at 8:00 a.m. EDT to discuss Q1 results and how they are leveraging technology, data, and artificial intelligence to deliver innovative solutions. The webcast will be available live on their website, with an archived replay accessible for 14 days.

feed.title: Dycom Industries, Inc. Appoints Company Veteran Bo Gresham as its First Chief Revenue Officer to Lead Next Phase of Growth
feed.summary: Dycom Industries, Inc. has appointed James "Bo" Gresham as its first Chief Revenue Officer, effective March 30, 2026. Gresham, a company veteran with nearly three decades of experience, will oversee strategic market expansion and strengthening stakeholder relationships. His appointment comes as the telecommunications and digital infrastructure industries are experiencing significant growth, driven by fiber deployments and AI integration.

feed.title: Small business training program expands across Permian Basin
feed.summary: The University of Texas Permian Basin and ConocoPhillips are expanding their "Small Biz Builder" program to Monahans, Midland, and Hobbs, New Mexico, after successful pilots in Odessa and Carlsbad. ConocoPhillips provided a $150,000 grant to support the program, which offers hands-on training, expert mentorship, and financial tools to help entrepreneurs build sustainable businesses. The expanded program now includes six in-person sessions tailored for both early-stage and later-stage entrepreneurs, fostering a supportive community among participants.

feed.title: [PX14A6G] STARBUCKS CORP SEC Filing
feed.summary: This SEC filing (Form PX14A6G) by Starbucks Corporation details an exempt solicitation by the Comptroller of the City of New York on behalf of several New York City pension funds. The solicitation urges Starbucks shareholders to vote against the re-election of Board Directors Jørgen Vig Knudstorp and Beth Ford due to ongoing labor issues and a rollback of independent board oversight since 2021. The filing includes texts of social media posts by the NYC Comptroller disseminating this recommendation.

feed.title: Exxon Mobil prices $169.312M floating-rate notes due 2076
feed.summary: Exxon Mobil (XOM) has signed an underwriting agreement to issue $169.312 million in floating-rate notes due in 2076. These notes are offered under the company's 2014 indenture and supplemental documents, with RBC Capital Markets, J.P. Morgan Securities, and UBS serving as lead managers. The related filings and legal opinions have been incorporated by reference into Exxon Mobil's Form S-3 registration statement.

feed.title: Exxon Mobil (NYSE: XOM) sells $169M floating-rate notes due 2076
feed.summary: Exxon Mobil Corporation has issued $169 million in floating-rate notes due in 2076 through an underwriting agreement with RBC Capital Markets, J.P. Morgan Securities, and UBS Securities. These notes were issued under an existing indenture from 2014, supplemented in 2020, and offered via the company's S-3 shelf Registration Statement filed in February 2026. This financial move, documented in an 8-K filing, serves as a financing transaction for the company.

feed.title: Is Nucor Corporation (NUE) One of the Best Stocks to Invest in for Good Returns?
feed.summary: Nucor Corporation (NUE) is considered one of the best stocks for good returns, with KeyBanc initiating coverage with a Sector Weight rating. The company anticipates increased first-quarter earnings, particularly in its steel mills segment due to higher selling prices and volumes. Nucor has also been actively returning value to shareholders through share repurchases and dividend payments.

feed.title: From ground hand to CRO: Dycom promotes company veteran Bo Gresham
feed.summary: Dycom Industries, Inc. has appointed James "Bo" Gresham as its first Chief Revenue Officer, effective March 30, 2026. Gresham, a U.S. Army veteran with nearly 30 years of experience, started at a Dycom subsidiary in 1997 as a ground hand and rose through the ranks before joining corporate leadership in 2023. This promotion signals Dycom's focus on capitalizing on growth in high-speed fiber deployments and AI-driven network infrastructure.

feed.title: Pitney Bowes Launches Temu Integration Within ShipAccel®
feed.summary: Pitney Bowes has launched a new Temu integration within its ShipAccel® solution, aiming to help U.S.-based sellers streamline fulfillment and shipping operations for their Temu marketplace businesses. This integration allows sellers to manage orders, generate shipping labels, and handle fulfillment workflows from a single platform, while also assisting with compliant onboarding to Temu. The initiative supports Pitney Bowes' goal of providing flexible tools for e-commerce sellers in an evolving marketplace.

feed.title: Rex American Resources 10-K: $650.5M Revenue, $2.50 EPS
feed.summary: Rex American Resources reported fiscal-year net sales of $650.5 million, a 1% increase year-over-year, and basic net income per share of $2.50. The company's profitability was supported by favorable crush spreads and 45Z tax credits, leading to a significant increase in net income attributable to shareholders. Rex American Resources is also planning substantial capital expenditure for expansion and carbon sequestration initiatives, with environmental permits still pending.

feed.title: Bristol Myers Squibb Discounts Sotyktu, Zeposia, Orencia SC on Government Site - News and Statistics
feed.summary: Bristol Myers Squibb has added three prescription medications, Sotyktu, Zeposia, and Orencia SC, to a government website with significant price reductions ranging from 40% to 90%. This move follows tariff pressure from the U.S. President and similar actions by other pharmaceutical companies like Amgen and GSK to offer discounted drugs. Discussions with drug manufacturers are ongoing to expand discounted medication availability further.

feed.title: Global X Copper Miners ETF (NY: COPX)
feed.summary: This article provides news headlines related to the Global X Copper Miners ETF (COPX). It includes recent stock performance data, showing COPX up +7.92% to 76.35, and a list of articles discussing metal markets, SPDR ETFs, copper prices, and the broader economy for early 2025. The content features analyses from Ira Epstein on gold and other metals, discussions on inflation, and the demand for critical metals.

feed.title: [ARS] Intercontinental Exchange, Inc. SEC Filing
feed.summary: This article announces an ARS SEC filing by Intercontinental Exchange, Inc. (ICE) on March 31, 2026, accessible as a PDF document. It provides key details about the filing, its neutral sentiment and low impact, and links to the original filing on SEC EDGAR. The page also offers an overview of ICE, including its market rankings, latest news, and recent SEC filings, along with essential stock data.

feed.title: Gold Fields Ltd (GFI) Shares Up 4.54% on Mar 30
feed.summary: Gold Fields Ltd (GFI) saw its shares surge by 4.54% on March 30, closing at $42.34. While the stock is significantly above its 52-week low, it remains 31.31% below its 52-week high. Wall Street analysts maintain an "Outperform" rating with an average target price of $55.00, suggesting a potential upside of 29.90%.

feed.title: Former AMN chief who led 26 acquisitions joins Teladoc board
feed.summary: Teladoc Health (NYSE: TDOC) has appointed Susan Salka, former president and CEO of AMN Healthcare, to its board of directors, effective March 30, 2026. Salka, who led 26 acquisitions and grew AMN Healthcare's revenue to over $5 billion, will serve on Teladoc's audit and compensation committees. Her appointment follows the retirements of two board members and is expected to bring significant healthcare leadership and M&A experience to Teladoc.

feed.title: ARKO Petroleum Corp. Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Results
feed.summary: ARKO Petroleum Corp. (Nasdaq: APC) announced its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year ended December 31, 2025, reporting increased net income and adjusted EBITDA for the quarter, though full-year net income decreased. The company highlighted the successful completion of its IPO in February 2026, which raised $206.7 million to reduce debt, and detailed the ongoing conversion of ARKO Retail Sites to dealer locations and plans for new fleet fueling sites. ARKO Petroleum also declared a quarterly dividend of $0.26 per share.

feed.title: Autocallable Notes Linked to Citigroup (AMUB) — Apr 2027 Maturity
feed.summary: UBS is offering Trigger Autocallable Contingent Yield Notes linked to Citigroup Inc. stock, maturing April 2, 2027. These notes provide periodic contingent coupons only if the underlying stock's closing level meets the coupon barrier, with automatic early call if the level reaches or exceeds the initial level. Investors face principal loss if the notes are not called and the final stock level falls below the downside threshold, and payment is subject to UBS's creditworthiness.

feed.title: Missing water outage alerts? Illinois utility says update MyWater
feed.summary: Illinois American Water is urging its customers to update their contact information in the MyWater portal to ensure they receive emergency and service-related alerts, such as those concerning water main replacements and flushing. The company emphasized the importance of timely notifications for service disruptions and outlined several customer assistance programs for those facing financial hardship, including discounts and help with bills. Customers can update their details, view active alerts, or register for a new MyWater account using their account number.

feed.title: High‑coupon UBS Notes Linked to AMD (NYSE: AMUB) Maturing 2031
feed.summary: UBS AG is offering Trigger Autocallable Contingent Yield Notes linked to Advanced Micro Devices, Inc. (AMD) common stock, set to mature on April 2, 2031. These notes pay contingent coupons only if AMD's stock meets observation-date barriers, with principal repayment at maturity also contingent and subject to UBS's credit risk. The offering includes an automatic early-call feature and carries an estimated initial value between $9.35 and $9.60 per Note, with a minimum investment of $1,000.

feed.title: UBS Autocallable Notes Linked to NextEra Energy (AMUB) — Key Terms
feed.summary: UBS AG is offering Trigger Autocallable Contingent Yield Notes linked to NextEra Energy common stock, maturing around April 2, 2027. These notes pay contingent coupons only if NextEra Energy's closing level meets a specified barrier on observation dates and may be automatically called early if the underlying stock meets or exceeds its initial level. Investors face significant risks, including potential loss of principal if the notes are not autocalled and the final level falls below the downside threshold, as payments are subject to UBS's credit risk.

feed.title: Ellomay Capital (ELLO) agrees Dorad-based NIS 560M sale while Dorad profit drops
feed.summary: Ellomay Capital has agreed to sell its indirect 50% interest in Ellomay Luzon Energy to the Luzon Group, valuing Dorad at NIS 4.4 billion and implying a consideration of NIS 560 million. This comes as Dorad Energy's 2025 net profit declined to NIS 148.4 million from NIS 452.3 million in 2024, impacted by increased financing expenses and war-related disruptions, including a 22% revenue drop in June 2025. The sale is subject to regulatory and lender approvals.

feed.title: HF Sinclair (NYSE: DINO) returns $724M to investors in 2025
feed.summary: HF Sinclair's 2026 proxy statement details a virtual annual meeting on May 13, 2026, to elect directors, vote on executive pay, and ratify auditors. The company reported $1.3 billion in 2025 operating cash flow and returned $724 million to stockholders that year, totaling $4.7 billion since the 2022 Sinclair Oil acquisition. Highlights include record Marketing and Midstream earnings, improved refining efficiency, and a 39% reduction in total recordable incident rates over five years.

feed.title: T-Mobile (NASDAQ: TMUS) streamlines guarantees on $10B credit line
feed.summary: T-Mobile US, Inc. (TMUS) reported that its subsidiary, T-Mobile USA, Inc. (TMUSA), released guarantees from certain subsidiaries under its $10 billion revolving credit agreement. This action, which followed the repayment of legacy debt, also triggered corresponding releases under indentures governing TMUSA’s outstanding senior notes and other debt facilities. The change streamlines the company's guarantee structure, with T-Mobile US, Inc., Sprint LLC, Sprint Capital Corporation, and Sprint Communications LLC now serving as guarantors.

feed.title: Datacentrex Raises $20.2 Million; Amends Series A Preferred to Support Offering
feed.summary: Datacentrex (DTCX) successfully completed a best-efforts public equity offering, raising approximately $20.2 million in gross proceeds. The offering involved pricing common shares at $2.00 and pre-funded warrants at $1.99, led by Dominari Securities. Concurrently, Series A preferred holders amended their terms, waiving anti-dilution impacts and resetting the conversion to 23 shares at a $2.00 reference rate, to support the transaction.

feed.title: ConocoPhillips (NYSE: COP) CEO family trust sells 113,221 shares at $132.71
feed.summary: ConocoPhillips CEO Ryan Lance's family trust sold 113,221 shares of common stock at a weighted average price of $132.7085 per share on March 31, 2026. This open market transaction, reported via a Form 4 SEC filing, involved shares worth approximately $15 million. After the sale, the trust still indirectly holds 350,000 shares, while Lance also retains direct holdings and units in the company's savings plan.

feed.title: Kenvue (KVUE) director Richard Allison awarded 1,331 deferred share units
feed.summary: Kenvue Inc. director Richard E. Allison Jr. was granted 1,331 Deferred Share Units (DSUs) as non-cash board compensation. These DSUs, which represent the right to receive one share of common stock each, will be settled in shares after his departure from the board. Following this award, his total DSU balance stands at 37,634.229 units, including those from dividend reinvestment.

feed.title: Datacentrex (Nasdaq: DTCX) closes $20.17M equity and warrant offering
feed.summary: Datacentrex (Nasdaq: DTCX) has successfully closed a $20.17 million equity and warrant offering. The company issued 4,510,000 shares of common stock and 5,757,000 pre-funded warrants at $2.00 per share, with net proceeds intended for working capital and general corporate purposes. Additionally, Datacentrex amended its Series A Preferred Stock conversion terms, allowing each share to convert into 23 common shares at a $2.00 reference rate.

feed.title: 200,000 Tennessee gas customers move to Spire in $2.48B deal
feed.summary: Duke Energy has completed the sale of its Tennessee Piedmont Natural Gas business to Spire for $2.48 billion. This transaction includes nearly 3,800 miles of pipelines serving over 200,000 customers, with Piedmont employees transitioning to Spire. The proceeds will fund a substantial portion of Duke Energy's $103 billion regulated capital plan and pay down Piedmont debt.

feed.title: Spire completes acquisition of Tennessee Piedmont Natural Gas business from Duke Energy
feed.summary: Spire Inc. has completed its acquisition of the Piedmont Natural Gas business in Tennessee from Duke Energy for $2.48 billion, expanding its regulated utility footprint. The newly formed Spire Tennessee will be the largest investor-owned natural gas utility in the state, serving over 200,000 customers. This acquisition is expected to support Spire's long-term adjusted earnings per share growth and involves more than 200 Piedmont employees transitioning to Spire.

feed.title: Power producer Dorad booked NIS 2.65B revenue in 2025
feed.summary: Ellomay Capital announced that Dorad Energy Ltd., in which Ellomay indirectly holds a 16.9% interest, reported revenues of NIS 2,650.5 million and an operating profit of NIS 385.4 million for the year ended December 31, 2025. The results were significantly impacted by regional conflicts in 2023-2025 and a refinancing in June 2025, which led to a 22% decrease in Dorad's June 2025 revenues compared to the previous year. Ellomay will incorporate these results into its own financial statements.

feed.title: Duke Energy completes sale of its Tennessee Piedmont Natural Gas business to Spire – Company Announcement
feed.summary: Duke Energy has completed the sale of its Tennessee Piedmont Natural Gas business to Spire for $2.48 billion, a transaction initially announced in July 2025. Approximately $800 million of the proceeds will be used to pay down debt for Piedmont Natural Gas, while the remaining $1.5 billion will fund Duke Energy's $103 billion regulated capital plan over the next five years. This sale aims to support the company's energy modernization strategy and efficiently fund its capital investments while ensuring continued reliable natural gas service to customers by Spire.

feed.title: Duke Energy completes sale of its Tennessee Piedmont Natural Gas business to Spire
feed.summary: Duke Energy has completed the sale of its Tennessee Piedmont Natural Gas business to Spire for $2.48 billion, an agreement first announced in July 2025. Approximately $800 million of the proceeds will be used to pay down debt, with the remaining $1.5 billion helping to fund Duke Energy's $103 billion regulated capital plan over the next five years. This transaction allows Spire to expand its core utility business by incorporating nearly 3,800 miles of pipelines and over 200,000 customers, primarily in the Greater Nashville area.

feed.title: 25,000-share resale via Jefferies — Enliven Therapeutics (NASDAQ: ELVN)
feed.summary: Enliven Therapeutics (NASDAQ: ELVN) submitted a Form 144 to propose the sale of 25,000 common shares through Jefferies LLC, valued at $914,750, with an entry date of March 31, 2026. The filing also detailed several past sale dispositions by Joseph Lyssikatos, a beneficial owner, including transactions in January and February 2026. A Form 144 is a notice of intent to sell restricted securities and does not guarantee the completion of the sale.

feed.title: [PX14A6G] GENERAL ELECTRIC CO SEC Filing
feed.summary: Presbyterian Life & Witness, an agency of the Presbyterian Church (U.S.A.), urges GE Aerospace Company shareholders to vote FOR Proxy Item No. 7 at the upcoming May 5, 2026, Annual Meeting. This proposal requests an independent third-party report on GE Aerospace's due diligence processes regarding human rights and international humanitarian law violations in conflict-affected and high-risk areas (CAHRA) related to its defense-related sales. The filers argue current disclosures are insufficient and cite potential legal, regulatory, operational, and reputational risks from dealings with countries credibly accused of human rights violations.

feed.title: Research Alert: CFRA Keeps Buy Opinion On Shares Of Constellation Energy Corporation
feed.summary: CFRA has maintained a 'Buy' opinion on shares of Constellation Energy Corporation (CEG). The article also briefly mentions Unity Software's (U.US) fourth-quarter financial results, reporting revenue of $609 million which beat estimates, and a quarterly loss of 66 cents per share.

feed.title: [144] Enliven Therapeutics, Inc. SEC Filing
feed.summary: Andrew Phillips, associated with Enliven Therapeutics, Inc. (ELVN), has filed a Form 144 to sell 26,035 shares of Common Stock acquired through a stock option exercise on March 31, 2026. This filing also discloses previous sales of 21,844 shares on February 2, 2026, and 1,520 shares on January 22, 2026. The proposed sale is valued at $1,003,610.20 and will be executed through Morgan Stanley Smith Barney LLC.

feed.title: Loews (NYSE: L) director James S. Tisch gets 235-share quarterly grant
feed.summary: Loews Corp director James S. Tisch received a quarterly grant of 235 shares of Common Stock as part of his compensation under the 2025 Incentive Compensation Plan. This transaction increases his direct holdings to 2,873,298 shares, with additional indirect holdings through trusts and his spouse. This is a routine grant and not an open-market purchase, thus having weak signaling value for general investors.

feed.title: Data I/O (DAIO) delays 2025 Form 10-K, expects filing by April 15, 2026
feed.summary: Data I/O Corporation (DAIO) has filed a Form 12b-25 with the SEC, indicating it will not be able to file its 2025 Annual Report on Form 10-K by the original due date of March 31, 2026. The company stated that additional time is needed to complete audit procedures. Data I/O anticipates filing the Form 10-K no later than April 15, 2026, and does not expect any significant changes in its results of operations.

feed.title: [144] Dianthus Therapeutics, Inc. /DE/ SEC Filing
feed.summary: Dianthus Therapeutics, Inc. (DNTH) has filed a Form 144 with the SEC, indicating a proposed sale of securities. The filing details the sale of 114,367 shares of common stock by an individual through Morgan Stanley Smith Barney LLC, acquired on March 31, 2026, via the exercise of stock options. This neutral filing suggests a routine transaction with no reported material adverse information from the seller.

feed.title: 3,639 RSUs registered; CYTK (NASDAQ: CYTK) insider 10b5-1 sales listed
feed.summary: Cytokinetics (NASDAQ: CYTK) has filed a Form 144 to register the proposed sale of 3,639 Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) dated March 6, 2026. The filing also details multiple pre-arranged 10b5-1 sales by insider Andrew Callos between January 2, 2026, and March 18, 2026, including transactions of 15,000 shares and 11,000 shares on March 5, 2026, with reported proceeds. This indicates routine insider trading activity rather than information-based trading.

feed.title: DNTH insider sells 27,594 shares via 10b5-1; plans 1,198-share option sale (DNTH)
feed.summary: An insider at Dianthus Therapeutics (DNTH) has reported a planned sale of 1,198 shares of common stock on March 31, 2026, stemming from the exercise of stock options. Additionally, the filing discloses recent 10b5-1 sales completed on March 24, 2026, totaling 27,594 shares, which generated aggregate proceeds of $2,153,579.25. These transactions are routine compliance filings for insider dispositions.

feed.title: Cytokinetics (CYTK) EVP sells 3,639 shares, retains 66,004
feed.summary: Andrew Callos, EVP and Chief Commercial Officer of Cytokinetics (CYTK), sold 3,639 shares of Common Stock at $65.00 per share on March 31, 2026. Following this transaction, Callos directly holds 66,004 shares of Cytokinetics Common Stock. This open-market sale, detailed in a Form 4 filing, amounted to $236,535.

feed.title: Positive Outlook for Narrow-Moat Iqvia Supported by Durable Demand, AI Innovation, and Execution
feed.summary: Iqvia, formed from the merger of Quintiles and IMS Health, is a leader in contract research organizations and life sciences data. The company benefits from durable demand, AI innovation, and strong execution. This positive outlook is supported by its strong position in real-world evidence and robust business strategy.

feed.title: Loews (L) director Jonathan C. Locker gets 235-share quarterly equity grant
feed.summary: Jonathan C. Locker, a director at Loews Corporation (L), received a quarterly equity grant of 235 shares of common stock for his board service. These shares were awarded at no cash cost under the company's 2025 Incentive Compensation Plan, increasing his direct holdings to 25,225 common shares. This transaction was reported in a Form 4 filing and is part of his director compensation.
